com.delphix.masking.api.plugin.config

Interface GroupedProperties

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    GroupedPropertiesImpl

    public interface GroupedProperties

      Create an object that implements GroupedProperties from a JSON string,

      Retrieve the value of a property with type Property.Type.BOOLEAN in the schema.

      Retrieve the value of a property with type Property.Type.DOUBLE in the schema.

      Retrieve the value of a property with type Property.Type.FILE in the schema.

      Retrieve the value of a property with type Property.Type.LONG in the schema.

      Retrieve the value of a property with type Property.Type.REGEX in the schema.

      Retrieve a group with type Group.Type.REPEAT in the schema.
      GroupedProperties getSimpleGroup(java.lang.String groupName)
      Retrieve a group with type Group.Type.SIMPLE in the schema.

      Retrieve the value of a property with type Property.Type.LIST in the schema.

      Retrieve the value of a property with type Property.Type.MAP in the schema.

      Retrieve the value of a property with type Property.Type.STRING or Property.Type.ENUM in the schema.

      Serialize the content of this object to a JSON String.

    • Method Detail

      • fromJson

        static GroupedProperties fromJson(Schema schema,
                                  java.lang.String json)
                           throws com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonProcessingException
        Create an object that implements GroupedProperties from a JSON string,
        Parameters:
        schema - The schema for the GroupedProperties
        json - A Json string containing the property values
        Returns:
        The new object
        Throws:
        com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonProcessingException - When the JSON is invalid
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - When the JSON is valid but does not match the provided schema

      • fromJson

        static GroupedProperties fromJson(Schema schema,
                                  com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode json)
                           throws com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonProcessingException
        Create an object that implements GroupedProperties from a tree of JsonNode objects
        Parameters:
        schema - The schema for the GroupedProperties
        json - The root node of the object tree
        Returns:
        The new object
        Throws:
        com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonProcessingException - When the JSON is valid but does not match the provided schema

      • toJson

        java.lang.String toJson()
        Serialize the content of this object to a JSON String. The JSON will include any default values specified by the Schema that were not explicitly supplied in the JSON from which this object was created.
        Returns:
        The JSON string

      • toJsonNode

        com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode toJsonNode()
        Convert this object into a tree of JsonNode objects.
        Returns:
        The root JsonNode of the resulting tree

      • getBooleanProp

        java.lang.Boolean getBooleanProp(java.lang.String propertyName)
        Retrieve the value of a property with type Property.Type.BOOLEAN in the schema.
        Parameters:
        propertyName - The name of the property
        Returns:
        The property value, which may be null when the property is optional and no default is supplied in the schema
